channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NCAA to dole out $1.2B to help pay for House settlement. Its president asks for Congress to step in
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Stressing his own organization's ability to pay out $1.2 billion over 10 years to help settle an industry-changing lawsuit, NCAA President Charlie Baker also urged Congress to pass legislation that could put college sports on a better path.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NCAA to dole out $1.2B to help pay for House settlement. Its president asks for Congress to step in
item.description: Stressing his own organization’s ability to pay out $1.2 billion over 10 years to help settle an industry-changing lawsuit, NCAA President Charlie Baker also urged Congress to pass legislation that could put college sports on a better path.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Texans waive Diontae Johnson, who was released earlier by Ravens after refusing to enter a game
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — The Houston Texans waived Diontae Johnson Tuesday after the beleaguered receiver — who was released by the Ravens earlier this season after refusing to enter a game — played just two games for them.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Japanese phenom Roki Sasaki's MLB deal could spur chaos in Latin America. Here's why
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Roki Sasaki can sign with Major League Baseball teams during a nine-day window starting Wednesday, an unusual free agency with ripple effects for Latin American teenagers whose unofficial agreements worth millions are on hold pending his decision.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mike Tomlin doesn't feel the Steelers are stuck, but all options are on the table heading into 2025
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — There is a sameness to the way the Pittsburgh Steelers keep ending their seasons. Yet Mike Tomlin shrugged on Tuesday when asked if it feels as if the Steelers are “stuck” after their fifth first-round playoff exit in eight years, all of them embarrassing in their own way.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ohio State has slowly paced itself on offense all the way to the national championship game
item.description: Ohio State has been purposely pacing itself on offense all season, huddling more and trying to limit the number of snaps in each game of what the Buckeyes hoped and anticipated would be a long run. “I know it sounds crazy, the huddle, it’s almost like going back in time,” coach Ryan Day said.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Montréal Canadiens hockey player struck by car while in Salt Lake City
item.description: The team later confirmed Emil Heineman suffered an "upper-body" injury and is expected to be sidelined for three to four weeks.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, NewsNation

item.title: Bucs' 2024 first-round pick reflects on rookie year
item.description: Rookie center Graham Barton has taken the NFL by storm and reflected on his first year in the league.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Heat's Kevin Love uses OnlyFans model to describe team's poor 2nd half in loss to Clippers
item.description: Miami Heat star Kevin Love used an OnlyFans model's sexual exploits to describe how the team fared in the second half in their loss to the Los Angeles Clippers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rams' Matthew Stafford acknowledges 'playing for people back home' amid LA wildfires
item.description: Los Angeles Rams quarterback Matthew Stafford acknowledged the team played Monday night with a lot on their minds, including the Los Angeles wildfires.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kaapo Kakko thriving with Kraken after trade from Rangers
item.description: Seattle Kraken right-winger Kaapo Kakko is finding his groove and starting to thrive his new team after being traded from the New York Rangers in December.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jemele Hill quietly deletes Caitlin Clark post following stalker arrest
item.description: Former ESPN broadcaster Jemele Hill was caught deleting a critical tweet about Caitlin Clark dealing with social media adversity after an alleged stalker was arrested.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: High school girls basketball rankings Jan. 14, 2025: Bay Area News Group Top 20
item.description: Archbishop Mitty remains No. 1, followed by Acalanes, Carondelet, San Ramon Valley. Oakland Tech among teams to move up.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, The Mercury News

item.title: Jenson Brooksby returns to pro tennis at the Australian Open after 2 eventful years away
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Two eventful years after his most recent official tennis match — a stretch that included a pair of wrist operations, a bum shoulder, a coaching change and a suspension related to missed drug tests — Jenson Brooksby returned to action Tuesday at the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rams host wild-card playoff game nearly 400 miles east of LA because of wildfires
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — The Los Angeles Rams made themselves at home on Monday night for their NFL wild-card playoff game against the Minnesota Vikings — even if their adopted stadium featured an unusual amount of red and was nearly 400 miles east of their regular venue.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Cubs sign former Brewers starting pitcher to one-year deal
item.description: The Chicago Cubs have signed former Milwaukee Brewers starting pitcher Colin Rea to a new contract for the 2025 MLB season, while the Cubs have designated RHP Michael Arias for assignment to make room for Rea on the 40-man roster.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Patriots introduce Mike Vrabel as new head coach
item.description: The New England Patriots are set to formally introduce Mike Vrabel as the team's 16th head coach in franchise history.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get caught up at the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: How to watch the Australian Open on TV — In the
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Texans get 2 points on blocked extra point return vs. Chargers, 1st in NFL playoff history
item.description: Houston's D'Angelo Ross returned a blocked extra point for two points in the fourth quarter of the Texans' wild-card playoff victory over the Los Angeles Chargers on Saturday — the first such play in NFL postseason history.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ezra Ausar scores 21 as Utah earns first Big 12 victory
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Ezra Ausar scored a season-high 21 points in just 17 minutes of action. as the Utah basketball team won its first Big 12 Conference game Saturday, beating Oklahoma State, 83-62.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Devin Booker scores 34 in Suns' 114-106 win over Jazz
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) - Devin Booker scored 34 points and the Phoenix Suns never trailed in a 114-106 victory over the Utah Jazz on Saturday. Booker had 22 points in the first half on 7-of-8 shooting, including 4 of 5 from 3-point range. He finished 12 for 20 overall and 6 for 12 from behind the arc.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Nationals and Jorge López agree to $3 million, 1-year deal
item.description: The Washington Nationals and former All-Star pitcher Jorge López agreed to terms on a 1-year contract, the team announced Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago faces Sacramento, aims for 5th straight home win
item.description: Sacramento Kings (19-19, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (18-20, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 3:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Chicago hosts Sacramento aiming to extend its four-game home winning streak. The Bulls have gone 8-11 at home.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lindsey Vonn impresses skiing into 6th place in her first World Cup downhill race since 2019
item.description: The racecourse commentator broadcasting Lindsey Vonn's first World Cup downhill race since 2019 — the American is age 40 and has a titanium knee — summed up how impressive the ski great's performance was.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago Public Schools paid $390K to do-not-hire sports officials
item.description: Chicago Public Schools paid $390,000 to at least 36 people who were on a do-not-hire list to officiate sporting events.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Vince McMahon reaches deal with SEC over hush money agreements
item.description: McMahon, according to the SEC, failed to inform WWE's board of directors and legal and financial departments of the settlement agreements.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: CMU Basketball: Men get first RMAC win under Dunlap as Women cruise past NMHU
item.description: After a three-week break, Colorado Mesa Basketball is back. And they're off to a great start in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Notre Dame secures spot in the CFP National Championship after win over Penn State
item.description: Notre Dame has secured a spot in the College Football Playoff National Championship game after defeating Penn State 27-24 in the Orange Bowl on Thursday night. This is a breaking news update, the original story can be found below. No. 3 Notre Dame (13-1, CFP No. 7 seed) vs. No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Las Vegas Raider Charles Snowden thought he was in Florida during DUI arrest: Video
item.description: Tests showed Snowden’s blood-alcohol level was more than double the legal limit after officers found him asleep and unresponsive in a running SUV, documents show.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, NewsNation

item.title: Independent streak helped build Notre Dame into football's historic and now modern behemoth
item.description: DANIA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — It was some combination of religion, a grudge involving Knute Rockne and maybe the simple notion that some people just don't like Notre Dame.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bulls fall to Pacers, 2-game winning streak snapped as longest homestand of season begins
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The Bulls were looking to go into their longest homestand of the season on a three-game winning streak. Instead, they'll be trying to start a new one.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
